# Tesla Energy

Tesla Energy provides Powerwall home storage, Megapack commercial storage, and solar roof products. Uses lithium-ion [[battery-technology]]. Partners with [[catl]] for battery supply. Megapack provides peak shaving in [[smart-grid]].
